title: Build a RAG System with LlamaIndex and Qdrant in Docker

required_one_of.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
required_one_of.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings + LLM synthesis

required_one_of.name: OLLAMA_HOST
required_one_of.description: Ollama server URL (e.g. http://localhost:11434). Also set OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL (e.g. bge-m3) and OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL (e.g. llama3.2:3b).
